subcodes.first_line: O My earth! Hast thou recognized him who soareth, on wings of detachment, in the atmosphere of love for the Lord of creation, and hast thou found one who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ارضی هل عرفت من یطیر باجنحه الانقطاع فی هوآء حب مالک الابداع و هل وجدت من
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God
